title: Ground Turkey Wrap
description: Fast, high protein, no oven needed. Seasoned ground turkey takes about 10 minutes to cook and works well for weeknight wraps.

instructions.text: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and stir for 30 seconds. Add ground turkey and break apart with a spatula. Season with cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper. Cook until no pink remains.
Halve the avocado and remove the pit. Mash in a small bowl with lemon or lime juice and a pinch of salt and pepper. Keep it chunky.
Lay wraps flat. Spread mustard across the center, leaving a 2-inch border at the bottom edge.
Layer baby spinach first, then a generous scoop of cooked turkey, then tomato and red onion. Spoon mashed avocado over the top.
Fold the bottom edge up and over the filling. Fold in both sides firmly. Roll away from you, keeping it tight. Slice diagonally in half.

notes: Ground turkey dries out fast — pull it off heat as soon as the pink is gone. Add a side of Straus yogurt or a handful of walnuts to push this meal toward 50g protein.
